top_strategic.title: Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment categories with ZERO brand detection
top_strategic.evidence: The camera sees these items but we detect no brands. ZERO detections: accessories, apparel, footwear, wristband. Near-zero: sunglasses(2). Each gap = a brand that could be paying for visibility data.
top_strategic.action: Add shoe/apparel/sunglasses brand detection examples to Gemini prompt — immediate revenue unlock

top_strategic.title: Sponsorship whitespace detected in 4181 clips (97.0%) — sell to brands
top_strategic.evidence: We detect unbranded equipment/space in 4181 clips. This is the gap between what's visible and what's branded — sellable data.
top_strategic.action: Package sponsorship whitespace data as 'brand opportunity report' for equipment companies

top_strategic.title: Brand Sponsorship Auctions (Reverse Detection)
top_strategic.evidence: Instead of us detecting brands in clips, brands BID to be placed/featured in upcoming match footage. Courtana facilities auction 'product placement slots' during high-viral-score matches. Brands submit their own gear imagery; our AI learns their visual signatures and flags optimal moments to highlight them (a player wearing their shoe during a viral point). Brands compete for placement, facility gets cut of auction revenue.

top_strategic.title: Longitudinal tracking possible: 44 players with 5+ clips
top_strategic.evidence: 44 players have enough data for improvement tracking. Top: PickleBill(280), Chintan(162), Tmf(89), Ironvarr(81), Santinofuntila(68)
top_strategic.action: Build player improvement trajectory product — track skill changes over time

top_strategic.title: Endorsement intelligence: 110 player-brand pairs with 3+ co-occurrences
top_strategic.evidence: Top pairs: PickleBill-JOOLA(428x), Chintan-JOOLA(251x), Tmf-JOOLA(188x), Ironvarr-JOOLA(175x), Daniella-JOOLA(140x)
top_strategic.action: Build 'brand ambassador identification' product for equipment companies

top_data.title: Viral shot: 'overhead' clips average 5.12 viral vs 'none' at 1
top_data.evidence: Shot viral averages: overhead=5.12, speed_up=4.27, reset=3.88, volley=3.51, dink=2.92, drive=2.87, serve=2.18, unknown=1.14, none=1
top_data.action: Prioritize highlight reels featuring high-viral shot types

top_data.title: Prompt fix: 5 badges consistently missed — add positive examples
top_data.evidence: Production awards these but DaaS misses them: 'rally master' (6 missed), 'new look' (5 missed), 'steady eddie' (4 missed), 'fresh fit' (3 missed), 'paddle tap celebration' (3 missed). These are real badges that our prompt doesn't detect.
top_data.action:
Add positive examples to Gemini prompt:
'When analyzing badges, make sure to check for these commonly missed badges:
  - rally master: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - new look: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - steady eddie: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - fresh fit: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - paddle tap celebration: Look for [describe visual pattern]

top_data.title: DaaS badge prediction: F1=0.98 (precision=0.99, recall=0.97)
top_data.evidence: Across 326 verified clips: 1184 correct predictions, 16 false positives, 41 missed badges. Overall F1=0.976.
top_data.action: Target recall improvement: add more badge examples to Gemini prompt

top_data.title: Signature moves = viral gold: 4279 clips with signatures avg 2.9 viral vs 3.9
top_data.evidence: 4279 clips have identified signature moves, averaging 2.9 viral vs 3.9 for clips without.
top_data.action: Auto-tag signature move clips as premium content

top_data.title: Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — true share-of-court differs from raw counts
top_data.evidence: Brands with significant venue-only detections (not product use): JOOLA (554/6965 are venue), Nicol (6/14 are venue), PUSHIT (5/9 are venue), Onix (4/45 are venue), adidas (4/47 are venue). Raw counts overstate market share. Product-use only: JOOLA=6411, Nike=685, PICKLEBALL=235, Reolink=132, HEAD=123.
top_data.action: Report TRUE share-of-court (product-use only) to brand partners, not raw detection counts

all_findings.title: Viral formula: quality (7.39 vs 4.37) + watchability (6.78 vs 2.43)
all_findings.evidence: Top 100 viral clips: quality=7.39, watchability=6.78. Bottom 100: quality=4.37, watchability=2.43. Both metrics track strongly with viral potential.
all_findings.action: Use (quality + watchability) / 2 as quick viral prediction score

all_findings.title: Worst predicted badges: serve returner (F1=0.9), hustler (F1=0.857)
all_findings.evidence: Lowest F1 badges: serve returner (F1=0.9), hustler (F1=0.857). These need prompt improvement.
all_findings.action: Add specific examples for these badge types in Gemini prompt

all_findings.title: Endorsement intelligence: 110 player-brand pairs with 3+ co-occurrences
all_findings.evidence: Top pairs: PickleBill-JOOLA(428x), Chintan-JOOLA(251x), Tmf-JOOLA(188x), Ironvarr-JOOLA(175x), Daniella-JOOLA(140x)
all_findings.action: Build 'brand ambassador identification' product for equipment companies

all_findings.title: Rally length matters: long rallies are more viral (long=3.1 vs short=2.2)
all_findings.evidence: Avg rally: 15.6 shots. Long rallies (15+): 2192 clips, avg viral 3.1. Short (4-): 66 clips, avg viral 2.2.
all_findings.action: Use rally length as a quality signal in highlight curation

all_findings.title: Prompt fix: JOOLA appears in 227/326 verified clips — add disambiguation
all_findings.evidence: JOOLA dominates 70% of clips. Prompt should distinguish: paddle logo (real JOOLA use), net logo (JOOLA sponsors nets), and venue branding (JOOLA sponsors the facility).
all_findings.action:
Add to brand detection prompt:
'For JOOLA specifically, classify detection source:
  - paddle: JOOLA logo on paddle face = confirmed product use
  - net: JOOLA logo on net = venue sponsorship, NOT product use
  - venue: JOOLA on walls/banners = facility sponsorship
Only count paddle detections as brand_category: paddle'

all_findings.title: Top content creators: PickleBill leads with 280 clips
all_findings.evidence:
PickleBill: 280 clips, viral=3.1, Steady Eddie
Chintan: 162 clips, viral=3.3, Dink Specialist
Tmf: 89 clips, viral=3.5, Kitchen Master
Ironvarr: 81 clips, viral=3.4, Kitchen Master
Santinofuntila: 68 clips, viral=4.0, Dink Specialist
all_findings.action: Create player spotlight feature for top contributors

all_findings.title: Viral arc: 'athletic' is 220.0x more likely in top clips (22.0% vs 0.0%)
all_findings.evidence: Story arc 'athletic' appears in 22.0% of top-viral clips but only 0.0% of bottom-viral clips.
all_findings.action: Prioritize 'athletic' clips in automated highlight reels

all_findings.title: Social caption generation at 99.9% — ready to productize
all_findings.evidence: Social media captions are generated for 4306/4309 clips. This is already a viable content-as-a-service product.
all_findings.action: Create API endpoint for social caption generation — charge per clip

all_findings.title: Brand-skill split: PICKLEBALL KINGDOM users excel at kitchen (7.5), PSA users at power (6.29)
all_findings.evidence: Among brands with 10+ clips: PICKLEBALL KINGDOM has highest avg kitchen mastery (7.5), while PSA has highest power rating (6.29).
all_findings.action: Build brand-skill correlation report for brand partnerships

all_findings.title: Brand Sponsorship Auctions (Reverse Detection)
all_findings.evidence: Instead of us detecting brands in clips, brands BID to be placed/featured in upcoming match footage. Courtana facilities auction 'product placement slots' during high-viral-score matches. Brands submit their own gear imagery; our AI learns their visual signatures and flags optimal moments to highlight them (a player wearing their shoe during a viral point). Brands compete for placement, facility gets cut of auction revenue.
all_findings.action: Evaluate: monetization_novel play

all_findings.title: Coaching Certification via Idea Lab Consensus
all_findings.evidence: Create a 'Pickle Coach Certification' where coaches must upload their own playing footage to Courtana courts. The Idea Lab auto-rates their shot quality, consistency, and teaching cues. Coaches need a minimum rating to list themselves on Courtana's coach marketplace. This creates a signaling mechanism for players hiring coaches AND locks coaches into our platform (they manage their 'coaching stats' continuously). Revenue: commission on booked lessons + coach tier subscriptions ($99/mo) for advanced analytics.
all_findings.action: Evaluate: platform_play play

all_findings.title: Skill standout: Ajr averages 8.5 in consistency across 6 clips
all_findings.evidence: Ajr skill profile: consistency=8.5, kitchen=8.2, touch=8.0, composure=7.5, court_iq=7.0, court_coverage=6.2, athleticism=5.2, power=3.0, creativity=3.0
all_findings.action: Feature Ajr in coaching product showcase

product_concept.name: BrandDetect Pro
product_concept.first_screen: Dashboard showing 4 equipment categories (shoes, rackets, apparel, bags) with detection confidence scores. Red X icons on missed detections, green checkmarks on confident matches. A 'Train Detection' button launches side-by-side UI: left shows 5 consistently-missed badge examples, right shows similar positive detections to learn from.
product_concept.why_powerful: Turns detection blind spots into sponsorship sales by training the model to see what it's missing, directly feeding opportunity pipeline.

connections.strategic_finding: Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment categories with ZERO brand detection
connections.data_finding: Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — true share-of-court differs from raw counts
connections.combined_insight: Combine 'Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment cate' with 'Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — t' for a targeted product.

product_concept.name: True Court Share Calculator
product_concept.first_screen: Paste a tournament or match URL. System displays two columns: 'Raw Brand Counts' (7 inflated brands shown in gray) vs 'Adjusted Court Share' (same brands recalculated after removing net/venue branding bias, shown in blue). A toggle reveals which brands lose share and which gain it.
product_concept.why_powerful: Brands discover their actual visibility is higher/lower than reports claim, creating urgency to verify share and negotiate accurate sponsorship ROI.

product_concept.name: Whitespace Sponsorship Atlas
product_concept.first_screen: Map view of 4181 clips with sponsorship gaps highlighted by equipment category. Filter by sport/venue/brand. Each gap shows 'True Market Share' (corrected for net/venue inflation) next to 'Available Logos' count. CTA: 'Export Sponsorship Brief' pre-fills brand contact list and opportunity size.
product_concept.why_powerful: Converts fragmented opportunity data into a single sales-ready asset that brands trust because it corrects for visibility inflation they already suspect.
